heading: Exemptions
label: 4506 Exemptions
notes: Amendments2016— struck out subsec. (a) designation before “The Secretary may”.Pub. L. 114–1202010—Subsec. (b). struck out subsec. (b) which read as follows: “A vessel to which this chapter applies is exempt from if it—Pub. L. 111–281section 4502(b)(2)(B) of this title“(1) is less than 36 feet in length; and“(2) is operating—“(A) in internal waters of the United States; or“(B) within 3 nautical miles from the baselines from which the territorial sea of the United States is measured.”1998—Subsec. (b)(2). added par. (2) and struck out former par. (2) which read as follows: “is not operating on the high seas.”Pub. L. 105–3831992—Subsec. (b). substituted “4502(b)(2)(B)” for “4502(b)(2)”.Pub. L. 102–587

children.text: good cause exists for granting an exemption; and
the safety of the vessel and those on board will not be adversely affected.
